title: EBTA Walk-Forward declaration (G3 form)
description: Formulaire G3 : declaration du calendrier Walk-Forward avant le premier fold. Source: SOP 04; DN-001 to DN-004, DN-027; PAQUET D'EXECUTION section 1.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 1 (G3 form) and section 2 (G3 checklist); SOP 04; DN-001, DN-002, DN-003, DN-004, DN-027

declared_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; must be before any fold data is accessed.

folds.description: Complete fold schedule. OOS segments must not overlap (DN-001).

purge_days.description: Purge window in days between segments (DN-027).

embargo_days.description: Embargo window in days for residual dependencies (DN-027).

warm_up_days.description: Indicator warm-up period excluded from evaluation.

no_oos_overlap_confirmed.description: True confirms that no OOS_k segment overlaps another (DN-001 / INV-001).

no_additional_holdout_confirmed.description: True confirms no extra final holdout is added after the Walk-Forward OOS global (DN-002).

information_stop_criterion.description: Preregistered criterion for stopping the Walk-Forward analysis (DN-004).

criterion_type.description: Type of stop criterion, e.g. FIXED_FOLD_COUNT, FIXED_DATE, POWER_BASED.

global_oos_start.description: Earliest OOS_k start date across all folds (for reference).

global_oos_end.description: Latest OOS_k end date across all folds (for reference).
